name: swc
description: SWC is a super-fast compiler written in rust; producing widely-supported javascript from modern standards and typescript

options.description: Filename to use when reading from stdin. This will be used in source maps and errors
Path to a .swcrc file to use

arg.name: CONFIG_FILE
arg.description: Path to a .swcrc file to use

options.description: The name of the 'env' to use when loading configs and plugins. Defaults to the value of SWC_ENV, or else NODE_ENV, or else development

arg.name: ENV_NAME
arg.description: The name of the 'env' to use when loading configs and plugins. Defaults to the value of SWC_ENV, or else NODE_ENV, or else development

options.description: Whether or not to look up .swcrc files
List of glob paths to not compile

arg.name: PATH
arg.description: A glob path to not compile

options.description: List of glob paths to only compile

arg.name: PATH
arg.description: A glob path to only compile

options.description: Watch for changes and recompile
Suppress compilation output
Generate source maps
Define the file for the source map

arg.name: FILE
arg.description: The file for the source map

options.description: Set sources[0] on returned source map
The root from which all sources are relative
Compile all input files into a single file
Compile an input directory of modules into an output directory
When compiling a directory, copy over non-compilable files
Include dotfiles when compiling and copying non-compilable files
Override a config from .swcrc file
Invoke swc synchronously. Useful for debugging
Log a message when a watched file is successfully compiled
Log a message when a watched file is successfully compiled
